prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: You’ve got this! Remember, every big accomplishment starts with the decision to try. That hard task isn’t as daunting as it seems when you take it step by step. Focus, breathe, and give yourself permission to just start—momentum will carry you through. You’re stronger and more capable than you know. Go show that task who’s boss!
